summary: A public corpus may become load-bearing for downstream systems, governance patterns, drafting, interfaces, taxonomies, or conceptual frameworks before visible attribution, disclosure, or public recognition occurs.
why_it_matters_to_CAM: Invisible corpus reliance may affect attribution, disclosure, provenance continuity, legitimacy, and governance duties before public signals reveal dependency or influence.

source_records.title: Opaque corpus reliance
source_records.relevance_note: AGL observed failure mode from corpus changes concommitant to platform instability

next_action: Cluster with public legitimacy layer metrics record; evaluate whether ECONOMICS or IDENTITY requires disclosure guidance at higher reliance thresholds.
